column1: We .... buy biscuits because our granny had baked a delicious pie.
I ... go to the hospital to visit my aunt last week.
The child had stomach trouble and ... take his medicine.
The planters ... to gather their cotton at once, as they had been warned that heavy rains were expected.
Next summer I ... get up at five every Sunday.
I will be a bit busy tomorrow. I ... take my dog to the vet.
My friends ... pick me up at 6 p.m tomorrow.
All people ... pay their taxes every month.
